seo.title: The Venetian Macao Casino — Spiele, Gewinne, Sands Rewards, VIP-Räume und Luxusurlaub
seo.description: The Venetian Macao lädt in unser Casino mit Baccarat, Roulette, Blackjack, Slots, VIP-Spielbereichen, Sands Rewards, luxuriösen Suiten, Restaurants, Shows und exklusiver Erholung ein.

hero.title: The Venetian Macao — Casino, Hotel, Spiele, Boni und Entertainment

advantages.title: Advantages
advantages.advantagesBeforeText: At The Venetian Macao, we bring together a grand casino floor, premium service and a complete resort experience.
advantages.advantagesAfterText: Our casino is built for guests who want gaming, rewards, dining, shows and relaxation in one elegant destination.

history.title: About The Venetian Macao
history.description1: At The Venetian Macao, we stand out through grand gaming scale and rewarding member privileges. Our casino blends high-limit play, VIP comfort and a complete luxury resort stay.
history.description2: The Venetian Macao is our casino for guests who value scale, style and a confident gaming rhythm. We have created a setting where classic table games, slots and VIP rooms blend with resort comfort. The atmosphere is inspired by Venetian elegance, with canals, arches, bright galleries and expressive design details. With us, a night can begin with gaming, continue with dinner, and move naturally into a show, shopping gallery walk or suite retreat.
history.description3: Our casino welcomes guests who enjoy energetic play as well as those who prefer a private premium format. We focus on service, smooth navigation, comfort and an easy flow between gaming areas. Sands Rewards helps members earn points and use them across stays, dining and shopping. Guests can enjoy popular games, a lively floor and the feeling of a major occasion. The Venetian Macao brings gaming, cuisine, entertainment and leisure into one complete journey. We create an experience that starts on the casino floor and continues throughout the resort.

customHtml.title: The Venetian Macao: Opening Hours, Payment Methods and Loyalty Program
customHtml.description:
The Venetian Macao — Style, Gaming and All-Day Enter­tainment

At The Venetian Macao, we have created a casino shaped by grand Venetian-inspired style, premium comfort and a confident resort rhythm. Our gaming floor is designed for round-the-clock play, while selected restaurants, retail galleries, show venues and leisure services follow their own schedules. Guests can move between table games, slots, electronic formats and private VIP areas created for elevated service. We focus on smooth navigation, so it feels easy to move from baccarat to roulette, blackjack, poker or slot play. The casino mood is supported by restaurants and bars such as McSorley’s Ale House for a relaxed night, Jiang Nan by Jereme Leung for refined dining, Hiro by Hiroshi Kagata for a Japanese dinner and North for a lively culinary experience. Guests can stay in spacious suites at The Venetian Macao, making the journey from gaming to rest simple and elegant. Around the resort, we offer shows, concerts, exhibitions, interactive art spaces, canal walks, gondola rides, shopping and family-friendly leisure. Major events are hosted at The Venetian Arena, The Venetian Theatre and Cotai Expo. Sands Rewards lets members earn gaming points, progress through tiers and use privileges across stays, dining and shopping. Sands Lifestyle adds further benefits for guests who enjoy restaurants, retail and enter­tainment. We bring casino play, hotel comfort, dining, shows and premium service into one complete destination.


Zone Days Hours
Main gaming floor Daily 24 hours
VIP and private tables Daily 24 hours or on request
Slots and elec­tronic games Daily 24 hours
Table games Daily 24 hours
Casino dining Daily By venue schedule
Shows and events By event By ticket time

The Venetian Macao — Service, Currency and Winning Payouts

At The Venetian Macao, we place strong focus on personal service because a premium casino experience begins with clear, respectful and efficient communication. Our team helps guests navigate the gaming floor, understand table rules, find cashier areas, Rewards counters, restaurants, hotel zones and resort services. English, Chinese languages and other language support may be available where possible, while key service points are supported by casino staff, concierges and guest service teams. We aim to make every interaction calm, clear and convenient for both experienced players and first-time visitors.


The main gaming currency used on the casino floor is HKD, while hotel, dining, retail and resort services may accept cards and other payment methods according to each venue’s policy. For gaming, guests usually purchase chips or credits through cashier services, gaming tables or approved machines, depending on the selected format. ATMs, currency exchange and cashier support are available across the resort environment, helping guests prepare a comfortable gaming budget. We recommend keeping receipts and identi­fication documents for larger transactions so cashier service can be completed smoothly.


Table game winnings are typically received as chips and can be exchanged at the casino cashier. Slot and electronic game payouts may be handled through a ticket, player account process or cashier validation when the amount requires additional checks. Larger winnings are processed with identi­fication, game confirmation and internal security procedures. We keep the payout journey easy to understand: our team can guide guests to the correct counter, explain which documents are needed and outline the available payout method.


Tax treatment depends on the guest’s personal status, winning amount, home-country rules and individual obligations. On property, the standard payout process is focused on cashier validation, while guests should confirm any personal tax consequences with a qualified adviser in their own jurisdiction. This helps players plan larger results with confidence and clarity. Our goal is to make gaming, payments, payouts and account handling feel secure, smooth and premium from start to finish.


The Venetian Macao — Visit Rules and Guest Comfort

At The Venetian Macao, we create a comfortable environment for guests who come to play, dine, relax and enjoy shows. Entry to gaming areas requires guests to meet the age requirement and carry valid identification. We recommend a neat smart casual style, especially when the evening includes restaurants, VIP rooms or live events. On the casino floor, guests are expected to maintain a calm atmosphere, respect other visitors and follow team guidance. Photo and video recording on the gaming floor may be limited to protect guest privacy. Large bags, bulky items and objects that affect safety may require storage or additional checks. Smoking is allowed only in clearly designated areas where available. Guests arriving by car can use parking with a free-time allowance and hourly charges after that. Free shuttle services are available from key transport points. We suggest planning arrival in advance on major concert, exhibition and holiday dates. Our team can assist with directions, check-in points, cashier areas, hotel access, restaurants and leisure zones.


Entry Conditions

  • • Gaming areas welcome guests aged 21 or above.
  • • Valid identification should be carried for age and identity checks.
  • • Casino access is supported by security screening.
  • • Sands Rewards members can use their card to earn points.
  • • VIP rooms may apply separate access conditions.

Dress Code

  • • Smart casual attire is recommended for a polished visit.
  • • Premium restaurants are best enjoyed in elegant evening wear.
  • • Closed shoes, shirts and neat tops are suitable for night visits.
  • • Beachwear, overly sporty outfits and untidy clothing are best avoided.
  • • Private rooms may have enhanced style expec­tations.

Gaming Floor Etiquette

  • • Guests should not disturb games, dealers or other players.
  • • Photo and video recording may require permission.
  • • Chips and gaming funds should be handled only under casino procedures.
  • • Smoking is limited to designated areas.
  • • Payouts and chip exchange are managed through approved cashier processes.

Parking and Arrival

  • • Parking is available with a daily free-time allowance.
  • • After the free period, hourly or daily parking rates apply.
  • • Free shuttles connect key transport arrival points with the resort.
  • • Taxi, transfer and limousine services support a premium arrival.
  • • On event days, extra travel time helps keep the visit smooth.

The Venetian Macao — Sands Rewards and Tier Privi­leges

At The Venetian Macao, Sands Rewards is designed for guests who want more value from gaming, stays, dining and shopping. Membership is free for guests aged 21 or above, with registration available at Sands Rewards counters or through a digital process followed by identity confirmation. Once enrolled, members can earn gaming points and enjoy privileges across the resort environment. Points help unlock higher tiers, recognition, offers and a more rewarding visit. Gold is the starting level and introduces guests to the program. Ruby is reached after 888 gaming points within 6 months and adds stronger benefits. Diamond is reached after 8,888 gaming points within 6 months and is made for guests who play more actively and use casino services more often. Restaurants and selected venues may provide discounts, priority service and member offers. Premium guests can enjoy Paiza formats with enhanced service and a more personal level of attention. We use Sands Rewards to make play clearer, stays richer and every visit more valuable.


Regis­tration Conditions

  • • Free membership — no joining fee is required.
  • • Age 21+ — membership is available to eligible guests.
  • • Valid ID — identity confirmation is required.
  • • Sands Rewards counter — an easy way to register on property.
  • • Digital appli­cation — available with required identity confirmation.
  • • Member card — may be physical or digital.
  • • Qualifying play — gaming activity earns points under program rules.

Sands Rewards Tiers

  • • Gold — the starting tier with core gaming and resort privileges.
  • • Ruby — earned with 888 gaming points within 6 months; adds stronger recognition.
  • • Diamond — earned with 8,888 gaming points within 6 months; ideal for active players.
  • • Paiza Platinum — premium format for elevated play and personal service.
  • • Paiza Diamond — expanded VIP level with refined attention to detail.
  • • Paiza Chairman — top personal-service format for our highest-value guests.

Bonuses and Benefits

  • • Gaming points — earned through qualifying casino play.
  • • Resort credit — available under program rules for selected experiences.
  • • Complimentary nights — points can support hotel rewards.
  • • Dining value — member offers enhance restaurant visits.
  • • Shopping redemption — points can be used at hundreds of participating stores.
  • • 10% discount — available to Gold and Ruby I at selected restaurants.
  • • 15% discount — available to Ruby II and Ruby III at selected venues.
  • • 20% discount — available to Diamond at selected dining and leisure venues.
  • • 25% discount — available to Paiza Platinum, Paiza Diamond and Paiza Chairman at selected places.
  • • Priority lane — available to higher tiers in selected restaurants and services.
  • • Personal offers — displayed in the app and based on member status.

customHtml_2.title: Entertainment and Gaming at The Venetian Macao
customHtml_2.description:
The Venetian Macao — Bonuses, Prizes and Special Offers

At The Venetian Macao, we enhance the casino experience with regular offers, hotel packages, dining value, shows and seasonal programs. Beyond Sands Rewards, guests can find extra value through stays, restaurants, shopping, exhibitions and enter­tainment. We often combine suites, pool access, fitness, shuttle services, ticket benefits and discounts on selected attractions. Guests who enjoy major events can build their visit around concerts, exhibitions and limited-time programs. Prize campaigns may feature total rewards of up to MOP 1,000,000 under active offer rules. Welcome value can reach MOP 2,038 when guests join a current campaign. Hotel offers may start from MOP 1,039 per night under selected conditions. Longer stays can unlock 2-night or 3-night packages with additional advantages. Dining offers include tasting menus, omakase dinners and fixed-price lunch sets. Enter­tainment benefits may include up to 30% off selected art or show experiences for hotel guests. We make the bonus journey flexible, letting guests choose gaming, rest, dining, shopping or a signature event.


Gaming and Prize Formats

  • • Up to MOP 1,000,000 prize pool — selected campaigns may include missions, lucky draws and limited gifts.
  • • MOP 2,038 welcome offer pack — value available to new members under current campaign rules.
  • • Progressive jackpots — selected slots may include growing prize mechanics.
  • • VIP play — private tables support higher-limit and more personal gaming.
  • • Tournament formats — selected events may include special rules and prize positions.
  • • Electronic games — fast-play options with a clear pace and dynamic betting.

Hotel and Resort Offers

  • • Stay 2 Nights — selected package from MOP 1,039 per night.
  • • Stay 3 Nights — selected offer from MOP 974 per night.
  • • Flexible Rate — stays from MOP 1,298 with easier planning.
  • • Book Early and Save — value for guests who plan ahead.
  • • Pool access — included in many hotel packages for post-game relaxation.
  • • V Gym — fitness access helps maintain a personal routine.

Dining and Gastronomy

  • • Jiang Nan Tasting Lunch Set — fixed-price refined lunch experience.
  • • Hiro by Hiroshi Kagata Omakase — dinner from MOP 1,488 per guest.
  • • Hiro Ramen Set Lunch — lunch set from MOP 200.
  • • Dining vouchers — selected welcome benefits may include restaurant value.
  • • McSorley’s Ale House — relaxed bar atmosphere for drinks and casual dining.
  • • North — lively cuisine with open-kitchen energy.

Enter­tainment and Seasonal Events

  • • teamLab SuperNature — interactive art experience with tickets from MOP 208.
  • • Up to 30% discount — selected ticket benefit for hotel guests.
  • • The Venetian Arena — concerts, sporting events and major shows.
  • • The Venetian Theatre — premium performances in an intimate setting.
  • • Streetmosphere — live performers, magic moments and photo-friendly scenes.
  • • Exhibitions — business, lifestyle and themed events at Cotai Expo.

The Venetian Macao — Popular Casino Games

At The Venetian Macao, we offer a wide choice of games for guests with different styles, pace preferences and experience levels. Our casino floor is built around table games, slots, electronic terminals and VIP formats. Baccarat holds a special place because of its simple rules, fast rhythm and dramatic table atmosphere. Roulette suits guests who enjoy the spinning wheel and multiple betting choices. Blackjack appeals to players who like decision-making, calculation and speed. Sic Bo brings a quick pace and many dice-based betting options. Poker formats attract guests who prefer strategic and competitive play. Slots create a bright visual experience with bonus rounds, progressive mechanics and many themes. Electronic games are convenient for guests who want faster access and comfortable limits. VIP tables are designed for privacy, personal service and elevated play. We support an atmosphere where every guest can find a preferred format, from timeless classics to modern gaming tech­nology.


Table Games

  • • Baccarat — one of our most popular games, known for fast rounds and clear betting.
  • • Roulette — classic wheel play with numbers, colors, sections and combination bets.
  • • Blackjack — a card game focused on getting close to 21 and beating the dealer.
  • • Sic Bo — dice-based play with many betting choices and quick results.
  • • Craps — energetic dice action with a social table atmosphere.
  • • Poker formats — options for guests who enjoy strategy and competition.

Slots and Electronic Games

  • • Classic slots — simple mechanics, quick rounds and familiar play.
  • • Video slots — bright themes, bonus scenes and expanded features.
  • • Progressive slots — prize pools may grow as play continues.
  • • Electronic baccarat — fast format with a convenient interface.
  • • Electronic roulette — smooth play without waiting for a table seat.
  • • Live formats — a blend of live atmosphere and electronic betting control.

VIP Games

  • • Private baccarat — personal format for higher-limit guests.
  • • High-limit tables — elevated-stake zones with a calmer mood.
  • • Paiza formats — premium service, privacy and refined attention.
  • • Personal assistance — support with navigation, cashier service and leisure planning.
  • • Tailored limits — conditions may be discussed under casino rules.
  • • Private gaming rhythm — less noise, more focus and stronger comfort.

The Venetian Macao — Betting Limits by Game and Zone

At The Venetian Macao, betting limits depend on the game, time of visit, floor demand, zone type and selected format. We offer mass-market tables, higher-limit areas, electronic games and private VIP spaces. The overview below helps guests plan a comfortable gaming budget before visiting. Current limits are always displayed at the table or terminal, or can be confirmed with our team.


Game or zone Minimum bet Maximum bet
Bacca­rat main floor HKD 300–500 HKD 50,000+
Rou­lette main floor HKD 100–300 By bet type
Black­jack HKD 300–500 HKD 10,000+
Sic Bo HKD 100–300 HKD 10,000+
Craps HKD 300–500 HKD 10,000+
Elec­tronic bacca­rat HKD 20–50 HKD 5,000+
Slots From HKD 0.02 credit Up to HKD 100 credit
High-limit zone HKD 2,000+ By table limit
VIP and Paiza On request Tailored

The Venetian Macao — Shows, Events and Nightlife

At The Venetian Macao, we shape the evening so guests can combine gaming, shows, dinner, gallery walks and relaxation in one smooth route. Our casino is part of a large integrated resort, so after the gaming floor guests can move into concerts, exhibitions, stage programs, interactive art spaces or live per­formances. The Venetian Arena is designed for major concerts, sporting events and large productions, while The Venetian Theatre creates a more intimate premium-show mood. Cotai Expo hosts exhibitions, business events, lifestyle programs and seasonal projects.


A regular enter­tainment mood is supported by Streetmosphere, featuring live artists, living statues, stilt walkers, magic moments and visual mini-shows in promenade areas. This format works well before or after gaming because it adds atmosphere without requiring complex planning. Guests who enjoy immersive experiences can visit teamLab SuperNature, a digital art environment with light, movement and interactive scenes. Gondola rides, canals and shopping galleries create a softer evening rhythm for a pause between gaming sessions.


Nightlife at The Venetian Macao is built around bars, restaurants, lounge-style evenings and late dining. McSorley’s Ale House suits drinks, casual food and a relaxed mood, while premium restaurants make the night feel more refined. Rather than relying on one nightclub format, we offer a resort-style route: casino play, bar, dinner, show, promenade walk and a return to the suite. This is ideal for guests who want to control the pace of the night while choosing between casino energy, gastronomy and live events.


Special events follow the current calendar and may include artist concerts, inter­national tours, cultural programs, exhibitions, sporting events and festive promotions. We recommend combining a casino visit with a pre-selected show, creating a more complete evening. On major event dates, the resort atmosphere becomes especially vivid, with busy restaurants, energetic gaming zones and lively galleries. The Venetian Macao is created for guests who want more than play: they want the whole night to feel like a major occasion.


Enter­tainment Options

  • • The Venetian Arena — major concerts, sporting events and large-scale shows.
  • • The Venetian Theatre — premium performances in a more intimate mood.
  • • Cotai Expo — exhibitions, forums, lifestyle events and seasonal programs.
  • • teamLab SuperNature — interactive art with light, motion and digital scenes.
  • • Streetmosphere — live artists, magic, statues, stilt walkers and mini-shows.
  • • Gondola rides — romantic canal journey with musical charm.
  • • Shoppes at Venetian — boutiques, gifts and evening shopping walks.
  • • McSorley’s Ale House — drinks, casual dining and relaxed bar energy.
  • • Dining nights — meals before or after gaming in varied restaurants.
  • • VIP route — private play, personal service and calmer relaxation.
  • • Seasonal offers — festive campaigns, gifts, draws and themed programs.
  • • Touring shows — concerts and artist tours based on the current calendar.

The Venetian Macao — Dining, Bars, Hotel and Leisure

At The Venetian Macao, we connect casino play with a complete leisure journey: spacious suites, restaurants, bars, pools, fitness, spa, shopping and promenade areas are all part of one resort route. Guests can begin the day with breakfast, relax by the pool, move into gaming, enjoy dinner, watch a show and finish with an evening gallery walk. Our hotel follows an all-suite concept, so even entry categories provide more room for rest, conversation and evening prepa­ration. Guests choosing a premium stay can enjoy larger suites, VIP check-in, upgraded amenities and a more personal rhythm.


Dining is one of the strongest parts of The Venetian Macao. Across the connected resort environment, guests can choose from more than 150 restaurants and bars, with Chinese, Japanese, Cantonese, Portuguese, Thai, Singaporean, coffee and casual concepts available. Jiang Nan by Jereme Leung is ideal for refined dining, Hiro by Hiroshi Kagata suits Japanese omakase, North adds open-kitchen energy, and McSorley’s Ale House offers drinks and a relaxed evening. This variety supports any plan: quick lunch, business dinner, romantic night or post-game meeting.


Between gaming sessions, guests can relax at Venetian Pools, V Gym, V SPA, Qube, Shoppes at Venetian or along the canals. Pools and cabanas suit daytime recovery, the fitness center helps maintain routine, and the spa creates a calm reset after an active night. Shoppes at Venetian combines retail, restaurants, canals and promenade atmosphere, so guests can enjoy leisure without long transfers. Family-friendly spaces support shared travel, while adults can enjoy dining, bars, shows and gaming zones.


We make leisure at The Venetian Macao feel complete: gaming is connected to the hotel, restaurants flow into shows, and shopping can become part of a walk and dinner plan. This is especially convenient for guests staying a few hours or several days. An evening route may include casino play, cocktails, dinner, a show and a return to the suite. A morning route may include the pool, coffee, shopping and another gaming visit. Our casino and resort environment create a rich, confident and convenient stay.


Leisure Places

  • • The Venetian Macao Suites — spacious rooms for rest, evening preparation and casino access.
  • • Royale Deluxe Suite — popular category with a comfortable layout.
  • • Bella Deluxe Suite — convenient option with two queen-size beds.
  • • Famiglia Suite — family-friendly format with child-focused details.
  • • Rialto Deluxe Suite — larger space for guests who value scale.
  • • Paiza Suites — premium privacy and enhanced service.
  • • Venetian Pools — poolside relaxation after gaming.
  • • V Gym — fitness center for keeping a personal routine.
  • • V SPA — treatments and calm recovery.
  • • Qube — kid-friendly leisure zone.
  • • Shoppes at Venetian — shops, canals, restaurants and promenade atmosphere.
  • • Gondola Rides — music, canal views and photo-friendly moments.
  • • Jiang Nan by Jereme Leung — refined cuisine and premium dinner.
  • • Hiro by Hiroshi Kagata — Japanese cuisine and omakase.
  • • Hiro Ramen — faster Japanese dining format.
  • • North — northern Chinese cuisine with open-kitchen theatre.
  • • McSorley’s Ale House — bar drinks and casual food.
  • • Tim Ho Wan — popular dim sum and quick dining.
  • • Starbucks Reserve — coffee break and meeting point.
  • • O Castiço — cozy homestyle cuisine.

items.title: Can I visit The Venetian Macao without staying at the hotel?
items.answer: Yes, guests can visit the casino, restaurants, shops, shows and promenade areas without a hotel stay, provided access rules are met.

items.title: Should I book restaurants in advance?
items.answer: We recommend reservations for popular restaurants, weekend dinners, omakase experiences and major event dates.

items.title: Is The Venetian Macao suitable for a first casino visit?
items.answer: Yes, our casino is convenient for first-time guests thanks to wide game choice, clear navigation, cashier areas, service counters and electronic formats.

items.title: Are there calm leisure areas near the casino?
items.answer: Yes, restaurants, bars, promenade galleries, canals, hotel areas, pools, spa facilities and shops are available nearby.

items.title: Is the casino suitable for VIP guests?
items.answer: Yes, we offer private gaming areas, elevated service, personal assistance and premium suites.

items.title: How should I plan a visit on a concert day?
items.answer: Arrive early, reserve dining, check show time, choose parking or shuttle options and allow extra time for entry.
